# 9takes full index

9takes is an Enneagram-based site focused on personality analysis, emotional intelligence, communication, conflict, dating, and public-figure interpretation.

Use this file for article-level discovery when you need more than the summary in `llms.txt`.

## Core pages

- https://9takes.com/ - Homepage for the platform and primary explanation of the site.
- https://9takes.com/about - Background on the founder, mission, and how 9takes approaches personality analysis.
- https://9takes.com/questions - Anonymous give-first question flow for comparing perspectives.
- https://9takes.com/personality-analysis - Main hub for famous people personality analysis.
- https://9takes.com/community - Essays about the 9takes philosophy and community.
- https://9takes.com/how-to-guides - Practical guides for communication, conflict, and self-development.

## Enneagram foundations

- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-tldr - Quick introduction to the Enneagram.
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/beginners-guide-to-determining-your-enneagram-type - Beginner guide to identifying your Enneagram type.
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-concepts - Core Enneagram concepts and principles.
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-influences - How environment and experience shape type expression.
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-strengths-and-weaknesses - Overview of strengths, liabilities, and growth edges.
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-types-in-relationships - How each type shows up in romantic relationships.
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-communication-guide - Practical communication guidance across types.
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-personal-growth - Long-form guide to Enneagram-based personal growth.

## Type guides

- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-1
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-2
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-3
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-4
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-5
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-6
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-7
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-8
- https://9takes.com/enneagram-corner/enneagram-type-9

## Practical guides

- https://9takes.com/how-to-guides/ultimate-guide-to-active-listening - Listening and conversation skills.
- https://9takes.com/how-to-guides/how-to-psychoanalyze-people - Framework for reading patterns without flattening people.
- https://9takes.com/how-to-guides/using-the-enneagram-for-self-development - Applying type insight to habits and growth.
- https://9takes.com/how-to-guides/dating-dynamics-by-enneagram-type - Dating dynamics and attraction patterns by type.
- https://9takes.com/how-to-guides/definitive-guide-to-relationship-conflict-part-1 - Relationship conflict fundamentals.
- https://9takes.com/how-to-guides/definitive-guide-to-relationship-conflict-part-2 - Relationship conflict repair and follow-through.

## Community and philosophy

- https://9takes.com/community/introducing-9takes - Origin story and thesis for the platform.
- https://9takes.com/community/inspiration-for-9takes - Why the project exists and what problem it is trying to solve.
- https://9takes.com/community/what-winning-online-arguments-looks-like - Argument quality, persuasion, and disagreement.
- https://9takes.com/community/mbti-vs-enneagram - Why 9takes emphasizes the Enneagram over simpler typologies.
- https://9takes.com/community/consensus-on-human-nature - Community essay on social dynamics and shared assumptions.

## Pop culture analysis examples

- https://9takes.com/pop-culture/tech-titans-ai-wars
- https://9takes.com/pop-culture/world-leaders-enneagram-personality-dynamics
- https://9takes.com/pop-culture/parasocial-relationships-enneagram-type
- https://9takes.com/pop-culture/streaming-royalty-enneagram-analysis
- https://9takes.com/pop-culture/dark-triad-meets-enneagram

## Notes

- 9takes is an interpretation and analysis site, not a medical or clinical authority.
- Personality analysis pages are perspective-driven essays, not definitive diagnoses.
- For the broad site summary and positioning guidance, see `https://9takes.com/llms.txt`.
